name: based fric
description: Based Fric is a meme-driven community token deployed on the Base network. Inspired by a small blue frog with a subtle sad-boy energy, Based Fric embraces internet culture, simplicity, and organic community growth. The project focuses on building a recognizable on-chain character within the Base ecosystem while keeping the structure straightforward and transparent. The token has 0% tax and is fully deployed, with its memecoin website already live. There are no complicated mechanics — just a community-centered asset designed for open participation and culture-driven expansion. Based Fric aims to grow alongside the Base ecosystem by fostering community engagement, meme culture, and long-term brand identity. Website: https://basedfric.xyz/ Contract Address: 0x6a780B087a16c9f4270cd0dFf6f44B7FEc1fdF25 Network: Base
